title: Instagram Visuals: Enhance Photography & Design
description: Discover how to create eye-catching Instagram visuals that align with your brand and boost engagement. This course introduces essential mobile photography techniques, including lighting, composition, and editing tips tailored to Instagram’s visual style. You’ll explore design principles and learn to use Instagram’s native tools to refine your photos. With expert insights and a hands-on photo activity, you’ll build the skills to produce polished, visually consistent content for your feed.
